narrative:
17 Ohio Senate district has 215,995 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -9.2% D−R vs -19.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
